description_long: This is a classical-style marble fountain featuring a prominent sculpted figure of a robed woman holding an urn, standing atop a square pedestal. The fountain includes two large oval basins on either side and a central, elongated bathtub-like basin at the rear, all set on a rectangular marble platform. Ornamental details such as lion head spouts and decorative reliefs are visible on the pedestal and basins. The marble surfaces show signs of weathering and patina, especially inside the basins, suggesting age and use. The overall design is symmetrical, with the statue serving as the focal point and the basins arranged around it. The fountain is likely intended as a decorative centerpiece for a public square, park, or garden.
description: A marble fountain with a classical female statue, multiple ornate basins, and decorative lion head spouts, all set on a rectangular marble platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the statue of a robed woman with an urn, flanked by two large oval basins and a central pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated bathtub-like basin at the rear and a smaller round basin attached to the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the main bathtub-like basin and the back of the statue, with visible water stains inside the basin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the round basin and the elongated basin, with the statue's side profile visible.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a classical statue of a robed woman with an urn, decorative lion head spouts, and relief carvings on the pedestal and basins. The style is neoclassical with detailed drapery and realistic human features.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain has two large oval basins and one elongated bathtub-like basin, all with thick rims and smooth interiors. There are also smaller round basins attached to the pedestal, creating a multi-compartment structure.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears dry in all views.
